Help me up.') — body interrupts action, casual register restored. Marcus now has four turns interrupted by body or dropped syntax, profanity in two turns, and no standalone aphorisms. Noor's 'That helps a lot now' was already sardonic-functional rather than thesis-like and was preserved.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 14 now lands its authoritarian state shift through a concrete late consequence: Priya's monitoring leads Lena to collapse the survivors into the cafeteria before nightfall. The revision also puts Min's death fully on-page, reconciles the temperature drop to the continuity sheet, preserves the required Priya/Marcus/Tomas/cold beats, and removes the packet's repeated schedule, register, diction, and punctuation tics.

Single finding addressed: Marcus's dialogue in the stairwell descent exchange was roughened to restore his casual, profane, physically fragmenting voice under withdrawal pressure. Replaced the polished quip and clean HVAC regret speech with body-interrupted syntax, profanity, and technical detail delivered through physical distress. No lines in the exchange now read as aphorisms when lifted from context. Noor's existing sardonic register was preserved unchanged. No collateral changes to other scenes. Heading contract, continuity, temperature-drop setup, and all must-land beats preserved.

Chapter 14 now uses Noor's systems-oriented perception more selectively, with the revised beats leaning harder on cold, bodies, crowd behavior, and territorial control instead of repeated systems-management metaphor.
